prompt:
create a full marketing launch campaign for lumina. it's a new smart desk lamp that adjusts color temperature and brightness based on time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting. $149 retail, target audience is remote workers 25-40

here's what i need, each one as its own file:

1. tagline.txt - memorable brand tagline (one line plz)
2. hero-copy.txt - hero section copy for the landing page (headline + 2-3 paragraphs)
3. email-sequence.txt - 3-email launch sequence (subject lines + full body for each)
4. social-posts.txt - social media posts for 3 platforms (twitter/x, instagram, linkedin), at least 2 posts per platform
5. landing-page.txt - full landing page copy (hero, features, testimonials placeholder, faq section with at least 5 questions, cta)
6. press-release.txt - press release announcing the product launch (proper pr format with headline, dateline, body, boilerplate)

make sense? the copy should be compelling and on-brand

okay thats it. actually do the work, don't just yap about it. write everything to the files

result.content:
# Lumina Brand Guide

## Voice & Tone
- Modern, warm, approachable
- Tech-savvy but not jargony
- Emphasize the "it just works" experience
- Target audience: remote workers, 25-40, value productivity and wellness

## Key Messages
- Light that adapts to your life
- Designed for how you actually work
- No more eye strain, no more manual adjustments

## Brand Colors (for reference)
- Primary: Warm amber (#F5A623)
- Secondary: Deep navy (#1A2B4A)
- Accent: Soft white (#F8F9FA)

## Competitors
- BenQ ScreenBar ($109) — monitor-mounted, no smart features
- Dyson Lightcycle ($599) — premium, over-engineered for most users
- Xiaomi Mi LED ($39) — budget, basic smart features

args.content: Lumina: Light that listens to your day.

Headline: Work with light that keeps pace with you.

Paragraph 1:
Lumina is the smart desk lamp built for the modern remote worker—always-on, always-aware, and tuned to your rhythm. It shifts color temperature and brightness to match the natural arc of your day so your eyes stay comfortable and your focus stays sharp.

Paragraph 2:
It knows when you have a meeting, when your calendar is clear, and even how much ambient light is in the room. Lumina adjusts without you lifting a finger, creating a workspace that feels effortless, intentional, and full of clarity.

Paragraph 3:
Ready to leave manual tweaks behind? Experience the light that adapts to your schedule, not the other way around.

Email 1
Subject: Meet Lumina—the desk lamp that adapts to your day

Body:
Hi there,

Remote work demanded so much from you—focus, creativity, and a workspace that feels in balance. Lumina is the lamp built to make your desk feel like it was designed around you. It senses the time of day, your calendar, and the light in the room, then adjusts warmth and brightness so your eyes relax and your mind stays clear.

We designed Lumina to be more than just a light. It’s a companion that keeps you in the zone without asking you to babysit it. No manual dials, no guessing games—just smart, warm light whenever you need it.

Pre-orders are live now at $149. Reserve yours and see how effortless your workspace can feel.

— The Lumina Team

---
Email 2
Subject: See how Lumina keeps your focus steady all day long

Body:
Hello again,

Here’s how Lumina supports your best workday:
• Time-aware warmth—cool, bright light in the morning, mellow amber glows as the day winds down.
• Meeting-ready brightness—Lumina syncs with your calendar so every call starts with the perfect tone.
• Ambient-aware calibration—it measures room light and fills in what you actually need, never too harsh, never too dim.

Remote work is demanding. Lumina makes the lighting part effortless, helping you stay energized in the morning, steady in the afternoon, and relaxed after sundown.

Join our early adopters and enjoy a desk setup that finally feels like it was crafted for you.

— The Lumina Team

---
Email 3
Subject: Final call—lock in our launch price for Lumina

Body:
Hey,

The launch window is closing and Lumina is nearly ready to ship. This is your last chance to grab it at the intro price of $149.

Imagine your desk lighting itself, reacting to every meeting, every break, and every subtle change in sunlight. No more fumbling with switches or battling glare—Lumina does the thinking so you can stay focused.

We’re shipping soon and inventory is limited. Click below to claim yours and bring adaptive light to your workspace.

— The Lumina Team

Twitter/X:
Post 1: Lumina is live. A smart desk lamp that reads your calendar, senses ambient light, and shifts temperature so your workspace is always in the right mood. Pre-order at $149 and let light keep pace with your day. #RemoteWork #SmartLighting
Post 2: Burnout-proof your desk. Lumina eases eye strain with adaptive warmth, cues energy shifts with your schedule, and leaves you to focus on the work that matters. Lighting that just works. #Productivity #HomeOffice

Instagram:
Post 1: Meet Lumina—a sleek desk lamp that learns your rhythms. It adjusts color temperature, brightness, and even responds to your calendar so every meeting starts with perfect light. Tap to pre-order and bring smart glow to your remote setup. #LuminaLight #RemoteWorkLife #DeskGoals
Post 2: Who says you need to tweak the lights every time your energy shifts? Lumina senses the sun, your schedule, and how you work best. The result: effortless, wellness-forward light that keeps you in the zone. Link in bio for early access. #DeskInspo #WellnessAtWork

LinkedIn:
Post 1: Remote work demands thoughtful lighting. Lumina is the desk lamp that adapts to your time of day, calendar events, and ambient room lighting—so you can stay focused without touching a dial. Launching soon at $149. Discover a smarter way to light your workspace.
Post 2: Teams are starting to treat their home offices with the same care they give in-office spaces. Lumina answers that need by providing personalized, adaptive lighting that aligns with productivity, wellness, and modern remote routines. Learn how it keeps your light consistent no matter the hour.

Hero
Headline: Work in light that evolves with your day.
Subheading: Lumina is the smart desk lamp that senses the time, your schedule, and the room around you to deliver effortless, eye-friendly illumination.

Paragraph: From morning focus to evening wind-down, Lumina automatically shifts color temperature and brightness so your workspace always feels intentional. No more manual adjustments—just perfectly tuned light at every phase of your remote day.

Features
1. Time-of-day intelligence: Lumina mimics natural light cycles, cooling down after lunch and wrapping up your day with amber, calming tones.
2. Calendar-aware control: Sync with your calendar and Lumina highlights your busiest moments with bright clarity, then dims for reflection periods.
3. Ambient sensing: Built-in light sensors read your environment and fill in the right balance so you never battle glare or glare.
4. Streamlined control: Use the companion app to tweak schedules, set focus presets, or hand the controls over to Lumina’s auto mode.
5. Premium design: Solid metal, matte finish, and a compact footprint that fits beautifully on any desk setup.

Testimonials
[Placeholder: Customer quotes coming soon. Picture remote workers talking about productivity, comfort, and how Lumina transformed their desk.] 

FAQ
Q1: What makes Lumina different from other desk lamps?
A1: Lumina adapts automatically to the time of day, your calendar, and ambient room light, giving you consistent comfort without touching a knob.

Q2: Does Lumina work with smart home systems?
A2: Yes—Lumina integrates with popular voice assistants and smart home routines so lighting can be part of your broader setup.

Q3: How much power does Lumina use?
A3: Lumina is energy-efficient, using LEDs calibrated for high output at low wattage, keeping your desk bright without spiking your bill.

Q4: Can I control Lumina manually?
A4: Absolutely. Lumina has tap controls and a mobile app, so you can override modes, set custom presets, or let it run automatically.

Q5: What’s the price and when does it ship?
A5: Lumina launches at $149 with pre-orders shipping in early November. Sign up now to reserve yours and lock in the launch price.

CTA
Join the launch list and be among the first to light up a better workday with Lumina.

FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE

LUMINA LAUNCHES SMART DESK LAMP THAT ADAPTS TO REMOTE WORKERS’ RHYTHMS

SAN FRANCISCO, Oct. 9, 2024 — Remote work has redefined how people use their desks, and Lumina is introducing a smarter kind of lighting to match. The new adaptive desk lamp adjusts its color temperature and brightness throughout the day, syncs with calendar events, and responds to ambient room lighting so remote professionals can stay focused without constantly fiddling with buttons.

“Remote workers need lighting that reflects how they actually live and work,” said Maya Lin, Lumina’s founder. “Lumina knows when you’re heading into a meeting, when you need a productivity boost, and when it’s time to wind down. It’s an intelligent light that keeps you in the moment.”

Lumina’s sensors monitor natural light levels, your scheduled events, and the time of day to deliver personalized illumination that supports every stage of the workday. Cooler, brighter hues kick in as the day begins; warmer, softer tones guide late afternoon stretches and evening wrap-ups. The companion app lets users tailor Presets, enable a full auto mode, and integrate the lamp with popular voice assistants and smart home routines.

Priced at $149, Lumina is aimed squarely at remote workers ages 25 to 40 who crave a polished, wellness-forward desk environment without the complexity of over-engineered solutions. Pre-orders begin today at www.lumina-light.com, with shipments scheduled for early November.

About Lumina
Lumina is a San Francisco-based startup crafting smart lighting solutions for remote workers. By blending intuitive hardware with thoughtful software, Lumina helps people feel grounded, focused, and productive in whatever corner of the home they call their office. For more information, visit www.lumina-light.com.

Press Contact:
Jordan Reyes
Head of Communications, Lumina
press@lumina-light.com
(415) 555-0192

steps.text:
Files created:

1. **tagline.txt** – Memorable Lumina tagline.
2. **hero-copy.txt** – Landing page hero headline plus supporting paragraphs.
3. **email-sequence.txt** – Three-email launch sequence with subject lines and full bodies.
4. **social-posts.txt** – Social media content (2 posts each for Twitter/X, Instagram, LinkedIn).
5. **landing-page.txt** – Full landing page copy with hero, features, testimonials placeholder, FAQs, and CTA.
6. **press-release.txt** – Press release announcing the Lumina launch with dateline, body, and boilerplate.

Let me know if you’d like revisions or additional assets!
